name: eXecutor
developer: Natalia Vystikailo, Kostiantyn Shugailo, Andriy Tkalich, Kyrylo Shemetko
short_description: This game is psychedelic fiction! Its first person/third person tactical shooter like no others. Face massive gun battles of robots and you. Robots take power and start full-scale military activity by fixing each others and build new ones but we cant tolerate this any more... Stay sharp.
detailed_description:
Ancient military robots were discovered after archaeologists excavated the site of an old city on a deserted island. The robots seize power and start a full-scale war, repairing each other and building new ones.

Your mission, as part of a large special operations force, is to gain full control of the island before it's too late. Humanity can't take it anymore. CO2 emissions are too high and we can't take it anymore. Our planet is almost on fire. Robots are involved in all kinds of criminal activity, from cryptocurrency mining to drug and weapons production. Use any weapon you can find.
Stay sharp.
